title: Seem (uppläsning)
notes: First-person confessional monologue: an older woman at a kitchen table at night, telling her child her life. Wants an older / experienced / weary female voice.
Voice chosen by A/B audition; samples kept at tools/voice-renderer/voice_samples/swedish/seem_auditions/.
No native-Swedish female voice is tagged 'old' in the ElevenLabs library; Sanna (middle_aged, calm, Stockholm) plus a slowed pace is the chosen approximation.
Use PCM as canonical working audio; WAV is for listening QA.
dist/ is git-ignored; rendered chunks are regenerable from this source + voice.json.
